title: carduus medius subsp. martrinii
intro: Carduus medius subsp. martrinii, also known as Scolymus maritimus or Scolymus maritimus is actually known as the scolymus maritimus, however there are plants with the name Carduus medius subsp. martrinii.  Carduus medius subsp. martrinii is a subspecies of Carduus medius, a type of thistle plant native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Carduus medius subsp. martrinii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine.
